source_pr.title: test: stable test cases
source_pr.body:
<!-- Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

### What problem does this PR solve?

Issue Number: close #16345 

Problem Summary:
- close #16345 
- stable this fail
```
FAIL: pessimistic_test.go:757: testPessimisticSuite.TestInnodbLockWaitTimeoutWaitStart
pessimistic_test.go:794:
    c.Check(duration, LessEqual, 1100*time.Millisecond)
... compare_one time.Duration = 1116419618 ("1.116419618s")
... compare_two time.Duration = 1100000000 ("1.1s")

```

### What is changed and how it works?

Proposal: [xxx](url) <!-- REMOVE this line if not applicable -->

What's Changed:

How it Works:

### Related changes

- Need to cherry-pick to the release branch

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- Unit test


Side effects

### Release note <!-- bugfixes or new feature need a release note -->

evidence: evidence: PR title: stable test cases.
evidence: relaxes timing upper bound (1100ms -> 3000ms) for lock-wait test and removes overly strict retry assertion to reduce flakes (session/pessimistic_test.go, store/tikv/isolation_test.go).
